summary: Group B update complete April 22, 2026. Direct-site Playwright checks confirmed no price changes at Groton Towers (Studio $1,600–$1,775, 1BR Fairfield $1,895, 2BR Boston $2,058–$2,059, 2BR Providence $2,262–$2,322), Groton Townhomes (1BR $1,875, 2BR $2,050 — both with 07/15 availability), The Ambrose (1BR $1,995, 2BR $2,345, $99 community fee), Meadow Ridge (1BR $1,130–$1,190, 2BR $1,285–$1,395). Reid Hughes still shows Please Call on all plans. Hedgewood still aggregator-only with stable pricing ($1,025/1BR, $1,325/2BR, $1,425/3BR). La Triumphe still Cloudflare-blocked on direct site; aggregator pricing stable and 0 units available per Trulia. No page updates required. All prices written back to apartment_prices.json.
